description: Vector is a contact-level intent tool that de-anonymizes website visitors and builds dynamic ad audiences from real buyer signals across LinkedIn, Google, and Meta.
overview: Vector de-anonymizes website visitors and captures contact-level intent, then syncs dynamic ad audiences across LinkedIn, Google, Meta, and Reddit to target buyers showing interest.
what_is: Vector is a contact-level marketing tool for B2B teams. It builds ad audiences from real buyer signals so you reach the right people when they show intent, and it de-anonymizes visitors on high-intent pages to fuel targeting.

It is strongest when you want to activate ads on real-time behavior instead of waiting for form fills. Dynamic audiences sync across platforms like LinkedIn, Google, Meta, and Reddit with strong match rates, and campaigns can start immediately.
Vector integrates with CRMs and many other platforms to create and activate audiences. It is not a CRM or enrichment tool; it focuses on signal-driven audience building and ad activation.
